title: OP (Overall Performance)
description:
An Crazy ModPack For Low end laptops/PC to run minecraft :)

Does Not Support Lunar Client :/
body:
An Crazy ModPack For Low end laptops/PC to run minecraft :)

My Specs:
Intel i3 5005u 
Hd Graphics 5500 512mb Vram
Ram: 4GB
OS: Window 10 PRO

And Guess What Average FPS in Mineraft is Above 100(Constant) 

Does Not Support Lunar Client

Main Discription:- 
This modpack includes various mods of fabric which can increase the gameplay performance of your minecraft!
This modpack contains its own in-game settings changing it is in your hands!, This modpack will increase your performance of gameplay without lag due to included settings of modpack,
Thus if you are a low end laptop/pc user you should probably try out this modpack if you really want to play minecraft.
